en_title: Forza Horizon and Need for Speed Meet in Maverick Games’ Debut Driving Project
cn_title: 《极限竞速：地平线》与《极品飞车》合体？Maverick Games首秀《Clutch》
subtitle: 竞速新王登场
opus_summary: 英国工作室Maverick Games公布了首款作品《Clutch》，一款“电影化开放世界动作驾驶游戏”。游戏融合专业赛道竞速与地下街头追逐，将于2027年春季登陆PS5、Xbox Series和PC。由前《极限竞速：地平线5》创意总监Mike Brown领衔，团队汇聚多位《极限竞速：地平线》系列老将。游戏采用定制版Unreal Engine 5，注重车辆真实磨损细节，并提供深度内外饰自定义。故事围绕一对天才兄妹在传奇赛事R1K与地下车群Midnight Collective之间的冒险展开。首支预告将在6月5日的夏日游戏节上公布。

paragraphs.en: UK-based Maverick Games has revealed its debut project, Clutch, which it describes as a “cinematic open-world action-driving game.” Clutch’s story will combine both professional circuit racing with “action-packed underground race-and-chase sandbox gameplay where speed and style meet high-stakes pursuits and risky escapes.”
paragraphs.cn: 英国工作室Maverick Games公布了其首款作品《Clutch》，并将其描述为一款「电影化开放世界动作驾驶游戏」。《Clutch》的故事将融合专业赛道竞速与「充满动作的地下追逐沙盒玩法，在这里速度与风格交织，高风险追逐与惊险逃脱并存」。

paragraphs.en: Led by former Forza Horizon 5 creative director Mike Brown, Clutch will launch in Spring 2027 on PlayStation 5, Xbox Series X|S, and PC.
paragraphs.cn: 由前《极限竞速：地平线5》创意总监Mike Brown领衔，《Clutch》将于2027年春季登陆PS5、Xbox Series X|S和PC。

paragraphs.en: Clutch’s story campaign will focus on a pair of sibling driving prodigies navigating their way through both a prestigious and historic racing tournament known as the R1K (described as a proving ground for the world’s top drivers for the past 100 years) and an underground car community dubbed Midnight Collective. However, when Clutch’s hero character finds himself in hot water and in need of a fixer, “the underbelly of the R1K is smashed wide open.”
paragraphs.cn: 《Clutch》的剧情战役将聚焦一对天才兄妹车手，他们既要穿梭于名为R1K的传奇历史赛事（被描述为过去100年全球顶尖车手的试炼场），又要周旋于名为「午夜集体」的地下车群。然而，当主角陷入困境、急需一位「摆平者」时，「R1K的阴暗面被彻底撕开」。

paragraphs.en: A first look at the story, actors, and the world of Clutch will be revealed at the Summer Game Fest Showcase on Friday, June 5.
paragraphs.cn: 关于《Clutch》的故事、演员阵容和世界的首次预览将于6月5日周五的夏日游戏节展示会上揭晓。

paragraphs.en: The announcement describes that Clutch will see players competing across a living PvPvE action-driving world, and it’s noted Clutch’s “open-world sandbox unleashes blockbuster action and unscripted chaos in every high-speed getaway.” At one point, a car is depicted firing a grappling gadget at a pole and swinging around it at speed.
paragraphs.cn: 公告称，《Clutch》将让玩家在一个鲜活的PvPvE动作驾驶世界中竞技，并指出其「开放世界沙盒在每一次高速逃亡中释放出大片级的动作和即兴混乱」。其中一幕展示了一辆汽车向一根柱子发射抓钩装置，并高速绕柱摆荡。

paragraphs.en: In the first look at Clutch, Brown discussed that the project is benefiting from the longest development of any game he’s worked on. Running on a custom version of Unreal Engine 5, Clutch will not only boast cars where “every exterior curve, every fleck of paint, [and] every interior stitch” is recreated perfectly, but cars that actually come with signs of wear, and signs that the cars have actually been driven.
paragraphs.cn: 在《Clutch》的首次亮相中，Brown谈到该项目拥有他参与过的游戏中最长的开发周期。游戏采用定制版Unreal Engine 5，不仅车辆「每一道外部曲线、每一片漆面、每一处内饰缝线」都完美再现，而且车辆还会带有真实的磨损痕迹，表明它们确实被驾驶过。

paragraphs.en: Clutch will also arrive with a deep level of vehicle customisation options, both interior and exterior. The initial showcase unveils a wide range of options, from steering wheels to exhaust tips, and seats to neons. However, not only does it appear we can expect a large range of custom parts and options, but there will also be human details available to help the cars feel even more real. The examples shown are things like coffee cups and drinks in the cupholders, receipts on the dashboard, or hoodies strewn over the passenger seat.
paragraphs.cn: 《Clutch》还将提供深度的车辆自定义选项，涵盖内外饰。首次展示揭示了从方向盘到排气管、从座椅到霓虹灯的丰富选择。不仅如此，除了大量自定义零件和选项外，游戏还将加入人性化细节，让车辆更显真实。展示的例子包括杯架里的咖啡杯和饮料、仪表盘上的收据，以及扔在副驾驶座上的连帽衫。

paragraphs.en: “I’ll talk through what we were going with there,” Brown tells IGN. “I’m not going to ding any other games in particular, because this actually applies to quite a few games, but I guess traditionally the presentation has a bit museum-like. Where the car, no matter its age, will be presented in a way that is completely pristine. Which then creates a problem that it’s so perfect that it doesn’t alway sit in the scene in a way that makes sense. Like, you’d be driving it around a place that looks like a real city or real countryside, with this museum-quality 60-year-old car driving around.
paragraphs.cn: 「我来谈谈我们的设计思路，」Brown告诉IGN，「我不打算特别批评任何其他游戏，因为这个问题其实适用于不少作品。但我觉得传统上，车辆的呈现方式有点博物馆化——无论车龄多大，都以完全崭新的状态展示。这就产生了一个问题：它太完美了，以至于无法合理地融入场景。比如，你开着一辆博物馆级别的60年老车，行驶在看起来像真实城市或乡村的地方。」

paragraphs.en: “It always pops out of the scene in a way that doesn’t feel real. You could never actually see that car, on a road, looking like that; it would never exist that way. The way it’d actually exist would be there’d be dust, there’d be little bits of build-up, there’d be carbon around the exhaust. There’d be little bits of wear here and there. If you looked inside it there’d be wear on the steering wheel where someone’s driven this and gripped it, and the leather would be sagging on the seats. Maybe there’d be sun damage on the leather if it’s a soft top. Once you start to layer in all those bits of detail, a thing just looks that much more real and loved.”
paragraphs.cn: 「它总是以不真实的方式跳出场景。你在路上永远看不到那样一辆车；它根本不可能以那种状态存在。真实的样子应该是：有灰尘、有污渍堆积、排气管周围有积碳、到处都有磨损痕迹。往车里看，方向盘上会有驾驶者抓握的磨损，座椅皮革会松弛下垂。如果是敞篷车，皮革可能还有日晒损伤。一旦你开始叠加所有这些细节，东西就会看起来更真实、更有人情味。」

paragraphs.en: Brown founded Maverick in December 2022, a little over a year after Forza Horizon 5 was released.
paragraphs.cn: Brown于2022年12月创立了Maverick，那时距离《极限竞速：地平线5》发售刚过一年多。

paragraphs.en: “I had been on Forza for a very long time and had achieved, I think, quite a lot with that franchise and really had an appetite to go and do something new; to try and push and do something new in the genre,” he says.
paragraphs.cn: 「我在《极限竞速》系列工作了很长时间，我认为在这个系列上取得了不少成就，并且非常渴望去做一些新东西；尝试在这个品类中推动创新，」他说道。

paragraphs.en: “The problem with a franchise that is as successful and, frankly, excellent as Forza is it’s very difficult to go and try and push that thing into a whole new direction because the business would like it to stay in the direction it’s going, because it’s good for business. I felt like there was an opportunity to do something different and do something a bit fresher in the genre.”
paragraphs.cn: 「一个像《极限竞速》这样成功且坦率地说非常优秀的系列，问题在于很难去尝试把它推向一个全新的方向，因为商业上希望它保持现有方向，这对生意有利。我觉得有机会在这个品类中做一些不同且更新鲜的东西。」

paragraphs.en: As a result, Brown departed Playground and set up Maverick Games, where he was joined by a number of other Forza Horizon veterans, including producer Tom Butcher, technical director Matt Craven, technical art director Gareth Harwood, audio director Fraser Stachan, and art director Ben Penrose. It was revealed in January 2023 that the team was working on a “premium open-world game for consoles and PC.” Brown explains the team has since grown to about 140 people, but they currently remain independent.
paragraphs.cn: 于是，Brown离开了Playground Games并创立了Maverick Games，多位《极限竞速：地平线》老将也加入其中，包括制作人Tom Butcher、技术总监Matt Craven、技术美术总监Gareth Harwood、音频总监Fraser Stachan和美术总监Ben Penrose。2023年1月有消息称，该团队正在开发一款「面向主机和PC的优质开放世界游戏」。Brown解释说，团队目前已发展到约140人，但目前仍保持独立。

paragraphs.en: “We are technically an indie dev so we will be entering ourselves for all the indie game awards,” he jokes.
paragraphs.cn: 「严格来说我们是一家独立开发商，所以我们会报名参加所有独立游戏奖项，」他开玩笑说。

paragraphs.en: “We are about two miles away from the Playground Games office, so still very close contact with all those guys and still have a lot of friends over there – we see each other every day. And then we didn’t do what a lot of studios do where they kinda go into stealth mode for a few years; we tried to – as much as you can do as a burgeoning, embryonic studio – be quite loud. We’ve always been quite open about what we’ve been up to.
paragraphs.cn: 「我们距离Playground Games办公室大约两英里，所以仍然与那些伙伴保持密切联系，在那里还有很多朋友——我们每天都见面。我们没有像许多工作室那样进入几年的隐身模式；我们试图——作为一个新兴的、初生的工作室——尽可能保持高调。我们一直对自己在做的事情相当开放。」

paragraphs.en: “There’s only so much you can say, because you talk about what you’re doing in terms of development, but you can’t talk about the specifics of the game, because you’ll expose yourself a little too early, but from the start we were trying to just do things a little differently in the way that put out ourselves as a studio and as a company, but also the way that we operate internally, and try and just really encourage it to be a very open and creative and innovative space. And I think that’s gonna show in the software; I think once you see what we’ve got I think that’ll back up the theory there.”
paragraphs.cn: 「能说的东西有限，因为你可以谈论开发进展，但不能谈论游戏的具体细节，否则会过早暴露自己。但从一开始，我们就试图在工作室和公司的对外展示方式以及内部运营方式上做一些不同的事情，努力营造一个非常开放、富有创造力和创新精神的空间。我认为这将在软件中体现出来；一旦你看到我们的成果，我相信它会印证这个理念。」

paragraphs.en: Clutch is looking to make a big splash within the racing genre.

“Just to give a sense of the ambition of where we’re going with this – I’m obviously very well-invested in car culture and automotive entertainment, and really aware that historically there’s always been these huge tentpole franchises that have propped up and pushed car culture forward,” says Brown. “There was that spell where Need for Speed – from Need for Speed Underground, Underground 2, and Most Wanted – was the number one best-selling game in the world, like, three years running. There was that period where Top Gear was the most-watched TV show and, in film, even though it’s not the biggest film franchise in the world, the Fast & Furious series is one of them. It’s made more money than Harry Potter; it’s made more money than Batman. And that is the level of ambition for Clutch, to set the tone for car culture across the next decade, and be that tentpole IP that drives culture forward.”
paragraphs.cn: 「为了让大家了解我们的雄心——我显然对汽车文化和汽车娱乐投入颇深，并且深知历史上总有那些巨大的支柱系列支撑并推动着汽车文化向前发展，」Brown说。「曾经有一段时间，《极品飞车》——从《极品飞车：地下狂飙》、《地下狂飙2》到《最高通缉》——连续三年成为全球最畅销游戏。还有一段时期，《巅峰拍档》是收视率最高的电视节目。在电影领域，尽管《速度与激情》系列不是全球最大的电影系列，但它也是其中之一。它赚的钱比《哈利·波特》还多，比《蝙蝠侠》还多。这就是《Clutch》的野心：为未来十年的汽车文化定下基调，成为推动文化前进的支柱IP。」

paragraphs.en: Luke is a Senior Editor on the IGN reviews team. You can track him down on Bluesky @mrlukereilly to ask him things about stuff.
paragraphs.cn: Luke是IGN评测团队的高级编辑。你可以在Bluesky上通过@mrlukereilly找到他，向他询问各种事情。
